objective:
Objectif: Stratégie de trading sur le marché 0GUSDC en 1h qui utilise des indicateurs inusuals pour trouver les moments où l'amplitude est haute (High_Aroon, high_ADX) et la volatilité est faible (low_ATR). Combinant ces deux facteurs avec un signal de trend puissant (EMA Crossover) et une combinaison des moyennes mobiles efficaces (Bollinger Band + Stochastic), nous avons l'intention d'obtenir des signaux pour acheter ou vendre les crypto-monnaies.

Les entrées seront basées sur un filtre horaire de liquidité élevé et une gating par volatilité implicite/réelle, avec un SL/TP adapté à la volatilité pour réduire les pertes maximales. La stratégie sera testée sous plusieurs configurations des filtres sur le temps (long vs court), le trend ou non (trend filter) et l'utilisation d'un signal de confirmation partiellement contraire pour éviter un comportement trop linéaire.

Notre objectif est de trouver une stratégie unique qui exploite des axes non usuel du marché, gère efficacement la volatilité et apporte

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy uses Bollinger Bands and ATR to identify high volatility periods in the market coupled with a powerful trend indicator (EMA Crossover) which is combined with effective moving averages like Bollinger Band, Stochastic, and RSI. The resulting signals are buy/sell opportunities that take into account both price action and historical volatility.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses Bollinger Bands, ATR, and EMA Crossover to identify high volatility periods in the market. The combination of these indicators can help to generate buy/sell signals that consider both price action and historical volatility. However, it is important to consider potential weaknesses such as overfitting with this complex set of indicators or lack of robustness against market changes.
[Backup plan] If results are poor (negative return), we could try the following: 1) Simplify the strategy by removing one or more indicators; 2) Increase filter parameters for better specificity in high-volatility periods, but with caution as it may increase trading frequency and commission costs. If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), adjustments could be made to parameters such as the middle Bollinger band level or EMA Crossover period length.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining ATR and Bollinger Bands to improve signal quality in trending markets

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is designed to use high Aroon, ADX, and low ATR indicators along with Bollinger Band and Stochastic in conjunction with strong trend signals (EMA Crossover) for buying/selling decisions. The filter settings are based on liquid trading hours and implicit/real volatility gatekeeping. The fallback contract will be automatically generated if the LLM output is not exploitable.
[Backup plan] In case of poor results (-4.68%), we would consider adjusting parameters or changing indicators to improve performance. If mediocre results (low Sharpe) are found, adjustments could include optimizing stop-loss/take profit levels and fine-tuning other settings like trend filter. In the event that this strategy fails, an alternative approach might be trying a combination of different technical analysis methods.
